title: El ojo de cristal
writer: Cornell Woolrich, Ignacio F. Iquino, José Antonio de la Loma
actors: Carlos López Moctezuma, Armando Moreno, Beatriz Aguirre
plot: With the intention of stealing the compensation for a work accident, Enrique kills an old man. However, it turns out that he had not yet collected it, so he will try, then, to falsify the signature of the check. Meanwhile, at the ...
